title: MC Classic: Resurrected
description: A work-in-progress project that aims to recreate the old alpha/beta Minecraft features by adding new blocks, dimensions, biomes, and items!
body:
**_Minecraft Classic: Resurrected, A blast from the past mod made just for people who love nostalgia, but don't want to give up the newer features 1.20 Minecraft has to offer._**


This work in progress project aims to recreate the old **Minecraft Alpha/Beta look and feel** by adding **new items, blocks, dimensions, and biomes.**


Reading the changelogs when a new update comes out can really help clear up any confusion on newly added features.

Playing this mod with a classic texture pack (Like programmer art or Golden Days) can really take away from the mod's features, as it makes it a lot harder to tell which features are vanilla and which features are modded.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


This mod currently adds:


- A variety of new blocks, some craftable and some generating naturally.

- A variety of new items, tools, weapons, and foods.

- New plants and crops

- New biomes and dimensions to explore

- A brand new acievement tab with 21 new achievements to obtain

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This mod works really good when paired with other mods like _**Nostalgia Tweaks**_. If you are looking for a **Classic Minecraft experience but you don't want to give up the modern game and features**, then look no further! **Using this mod basically lets you play dual-versions of Minecraft**. You could make a house with a Classic Cobblestone floor, and a modern cobblestone roof. So this mod is for people who want **old features and new features at the same time**.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I'm stuck and dont know what this mod does!

To get started, create a new world. **Don't use any mods that add their own world type (Like _Moderner Beta_) because then the biomes from this mod won't generate, and you won't be able to get anything from this project.** Once your world is created, explore around and look for one of the naturally-generating **Classic biomes**. Once a **Classic biome** is discovered, you can enter a cave in the biome and look for chunks of **Classic Obsidian,** **Classic Gravel** and **Classic Iron Ore**. Once you've found at least **10 Classic Obsidian, 1 Classic Iron Ingot and 1 Classic Flint,** you can build a **Classic Nether Portal Frame** and craft **Classic Flint & Steel**. If you light the portal with the **Classic Flint & Steel**, you will be taken to the **Classic Nether** (which currently has no features yet, but is still cool.) If you wish to visit infinite versions of the **Classic Biomes, look in the Crafting Table recipe book for instructions on how to craft the respective Flint & Steel versions for each biome. The mod _**Just Enough Items**_ can help with this as well.**

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Information about the new Achievement Tree:

- [Achievement Tree Top Left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e856f03044540d7a11b136828588180f34aaec0f.png)

- [Achievement Tree Bottom Right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6395690a449a28ba0f2de987d47702be4c135c4b.png)

**All achievements are based off the classic items not the modern ones**, And the achievements are just ripped from beta Java Minecraft. 

The **'Taking Inventory'** achievement is still WIP until I figure out how to make a function in MCreator for it.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Some features will be a **work-in-progress** for a while because there are some limitations to MCreator that I need to find workarounds for. And some workarounds take longer than others because I have close to zero MCreator experience and when I use ChatGPT for help it has errors and issues a lot more than I'd like to admit. 

**_Away from that, and last but not least, Enjoy!_**
